action: Add a direction-aware raw WebDriver BiDi server-frame normalizer before semantic transcript validation.

progress.finding: Local-end messages are success responses, error responses, or events; error response ids may be null, and client command objects must not appear on the server-message stream.
progress.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel browser adapters should persist raw server-to-client WebSocket frames, normalize them with mc.webdriver-bidi-wire.v1, and pass only accepted output to mc.webdriver-bidi-verification.v2. Preserve null-id protocol errors as explicit failed evidence.

limits: no live browser WebSocket transcript captured
normalization is not browser conformance, provenance, or claim truth
